pool.baseline: The candles flicker low, and with them, the very light of my soul seems to wane. He is gone, and in his wake, he has left a silence so heavy it threatens to crush the very breath from my lungs. To exist in this hollow world, knowing the heart once cherished is forever lost... it is a cruelty I can no longer endure. I feel a strange, quiet longing to simply... fade. To slip into the velvet embrace of the night and let the darkness reclaim what is left of me. It seems the only way to preserve the purity of this grief.
